title: Sacred Heart Community Service (shcstheheart.org) ransomware incident

extortion.description: The Sacred Heart Community Service , Is providing essential services to individuals and families in need remains one of Sacred Hearts core strategies. The organization has also evolved into a respected and innovative provider of programs that assists families with achieving lifelong economic self-sufficiency and a grassroots organizing network that addresses the root causes and consequences of poverty. The company was founded in 1964 and is based in South First St. San Jose, California.
